description_long: This is a large, irregularly shaped stone with a weathered, natural appearance. Its surface is predominantly pale grayish-white with subtle brownish and beige undertones, and it features a prominent, deep crevice running along one side. The stone's texture is rough and uneven, with visible pitting, natural indentations, and some smoother, worn areas. One side appears more flattened and broad, while the opposite side is more contoured and rugged, suggesting it may have been partially buried or exposed to the elements for a long period. The stone lacks any artificial markings or carvings, maintaining a raw, organic look. Its overall form is bulky and solid, making it suitable as a barrier or obstacle in an urban park or landscaped area.
description: A large, irregular, pale stone with a rough, weathered surface and a deep crevice on one side. Its natural, uncarved form features both smooth and pitted areas.
description_view_0: The stone's front shows a deep, shadowed crevice and rounded, weathered surfaces with subtle color variations.
description_view_1: This view highlights the broad, relatively smooth and pale upper surface, with minimal visible indentations.
description_view_2: The rugged, pitted side of the stone is visible here, with the crevice appearing deeper and more pronounced.
description_view_3: A side angle showing the stone's contoured profile, with both the smooth top and the rough, indented lower section visible.
attribute_location: urban park landscaping or roadside verge
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or barrier on the ground
attribute_pattern: Subtle mottling and natural pitting with no regular or artificial patterns; surface coloration is irregular and organic.
attribute_weathering: Rough and weathered with visible pitting and some smoother, worn areas, indicating prolonged exposure to natural elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Typically blends with natural landscaping elements or contrasts with paved surfaces; may be partially embedded in soil or surrounded by grass or mulch.
